title: ilex quercetorum
intro: Ilex quercetorum, also known as the Oak Leaf Holly, is a type of evergreen shrub or small tree native to China, belonging to the holly family (Aquifoliaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ilex quercetorum include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and protecting against respiratory infections, as well as having anti-cancer and neuroprotective effects. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
